feat.name: Spiritual Aid
feat.text:
When you call your spirit guide for aid, its presence bolsters your will and agility. You gain the Spiritual Aid reaction.   
  
**Spiritual Aid**

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You fail a Reflex or Will saving throw
feat.effect: You reroll the triggering saving throw. You must use the second result, even if it’s worse. If you roll a success, you get a critical success instead.
